final:
module RefModule(
    input Clk,
    input Reset,
    input Enable,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge Clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (Reset) begin
            Q <= 4'b0;
        end
        else if (Enable) begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
